reviews.comment:
Cero ganas le ponen, te lo lavan así nomás. Un désastre para secar y aspirar también. No lo recomiendo para nada.

(Translated by Google)
They don't put any effort into it, they just wash it. Drying and vacuuming are a disaster, too. I don't recommend it at all.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2ODZITW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
Tomé un café. Muy caro, no dan soda, solo agua.. Y hay que pedirla. Tampoco una masita para acompañar. 🤔

(Translated by Google)
I had a coffee. Very expensive, they don't give you soda, only water... and you have to ask for it. They didn't even give you a pastry to go with it. 🤔
